title: Implement wiki in Python
description: Implement wiki.py: render_page() with Jinja2, expose query/count/issue functions as template context.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting Python wiki implementation work. Plan: implement taskulus.wiki module with render_wiki_page plus template functions (query/count/issue/children/blocked_by/blocks), wire CLI commands under tsk wiki render/list, and add matching step definitions so wiki_rendering.feature can be activated without coverage regressions.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Completed wiki implementation for Python and shared wiki behavior parity work. Added wiki rendering context serialization, wired templates, and ensured specs pass with full coverage. Ran: python3 tools/run_specs.py --format text (Python 100.0%, Rust 100.0%).
